title: TC-LANG-001: Verify language update completes within expected time on Morpheus devices
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Start a timer at the moment the update begins.
5. Monitor the update progress bar at regular intervals (every 10 seconds).
6. Record the time when the update reaches 99% progress.
7. Record the time when the update completes (reaches 100% or 'Update Complete' status).
8. Calculate the total update duration from start to completion.
9. Calculate the duration spent at 99% progress.
expected: The total language update completes within 2 minutes (120 seconds). The update does not stall at 99% for more than 10 seconds. The progress bar moves smoothly without extended pauses.

title: TC-LANG-002: Verify language update progress bar does not stall at 99% for extended period
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Observe the progress bar throughout the update process.
5. When the progress bar reaches 99%, start a timer.
6. Continue monitoring the progress bar until it reaches 100% or the update completes.
7. Record the time spent at 99%.
expected: The progress bar does not remain at 99% for more than 30 seconds. The update progresses from 99% to completion within a reasonable timeframe.

title: TC-LANG-003: Verify language update does not exceed 10 minutes total duration on Morpheus devices
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Start a timer at the moment the update begins.
5. Monitor the update progress continuously.
6. If the update reaches 10 minutes without completing, mark the test as failed.
7. Record the total time taken for the update to complete.
expected: The language update completes in less than 10 minutes (600 seconds). The update does not get stuck indefinitely at any progress percentage.

title: TC-LANG-004: Verify language update progress tracking accuracy on Morpheus devices
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Observe and record the progress percentage at regular intervals (every 5 seconds).
5. Verify that the progress percentage increases monotonically (never decreases).
6. Verify that the progress percentage reaches 100% upon completion.
7. Verify that the progress bar visually matches the reported percentage.
expected: The progress percentage increases monotonically from 0% to 100%. The progress bar accurately reflects the reported percentage. No regression or stalling at intermediate values occurs.

title: TC-LANG-005: Verify language update behavior on multiple Morpheus device models
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device VOY5200.
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update and record total completion time.
4. Disconnect from VOY5200.
5. Connect to a Morpheus device VOY8200.
6. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
7. Initiate a language update and record total completion time.
8. Compare the completion times between the two models.
expected: Both VOY5200 and VOY8200 complete the language update within 2 minutes. Neither device exhibits stalling at 99% for more than 10 seconds. Performance is consistent across Morpheus device models.

title: TC-LANG-006: Verify language update cancellation during 99% stall
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Monitor the progress bar until it reaches 99%.
5. Once at 99%, attempt to cancel the update using the available cancel/abort mechanism.
6. Verify the system response to the cancellation request.
7. Verify the device state after cancellation.
expected: The system allows cancellation of the language update even when stalled at 99%. The device returns to a stable state after cancellation. No partial or corrupted language data remains on the device.

title: TC-LANG-007: Verify language update retry after 99% stall timeout
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Monitor the progress bar until it reaches 99%.
5. Allow the update to remain at 99% for 10 minutes.
6. After 10 minutes, if the update has not progressed, restart the language update.
7. Monitor the second update attempt for completion time and progress behavior.
expected: The second language update attempt completes successfully within 2 minutes. The retry does not exhibit the same 99% stalling behavior. The device handles the retry gracefully without requiring a reboot.

title: TC-LANG-008: Verify language update progress persists across device reboot at 99%
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Monitor the progress bar until it reaches 99%.
5. While at 99%, perform a device reboot.
6. After reboot, navigate back to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
7. Check the current status of the language update.
8. Attempt to resume or restart the language update.
expected: After reboot, the device reports the language update status accurately. The update can be restarted if not completed. No data corruption occurs due to the reboot during the stalled update.

title: TC-LANG-009: Verify language update does not affect other device functions during 99% stall
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Monitor the progress bar until it reaches 99%.
5. While the update is stalled at 99%, attempt to perform other device operations (e.g., navigation, settings, media playback).
6. Verify that other device functions remain responsive and operational.
expected: Other device functions remain fully operational during the language update stall at 99%. The device does not become unresponsive or crash. The stalled update does not block access to other features.

title: TC-LANG-010: Verify language update completion after 99% stall resolves
steps: 1. Connect to a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Navigate to the language update (LANG UPDATE) section.
3. Initiate a language update.
4. Monitor the progress bar until it reaches 99%.
5. Record the time when 99% is reached.
6. Continue monitoring until the update progresses beyond 99% and completes.
7. Record the total time spent at 99%.
8. Verify the device language settings are correctly updated after completion.
expected: The update eventually progresses beyond 99% and completes successfully. The language settings are correctly applied after completion. The total time spent at 99% is documented for performance analysis.
